title: Umami Greek Tofu Stir-fry
description: A tender umami-rich dish featuring a blend of vegetables and tofu in a flavorful sauce made with vegetable shortening for a low-calorie-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Silken tofu is recommended for this dish.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for better flavor extraction.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Fresh garlic adds umami and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.notes: For a touch of heat, can be adjusted to taste.

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Can be omitted for those preferring less citrusy flavor.

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt
ingredients.notes: For a creamy texture and to enhance umami taste.

instructions: Prepare tofu by pressing it with paper towels for about 30 minutes.
Heat vegetable shortening in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add red pepper flakes and lemon juice (if using). Stir well to combine with the vegetables.
Once the mixture is fragrant, add sliced tofu and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, ensuring the tofu gets evenly coated by the sauce.
Serve hot with a side of your favorite salad or steamed vegetables.
